sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n90008" key="prosptugma/tion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσ-πτυγμάτιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <gramGrp opt="n" TEIform="gramGrp"> <gram type="dim" opt="n" TEIform="gram">Dim. of</gram> </gramGrp> foreg., <sense id="n90008.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">small compress</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pad</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heliod.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:48:34:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">48.34.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
